| [US](#us){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="United States"} speed units | [mv](#mv){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="milliomegars"} | [km](#km){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="kilometers"}/hour |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [0.9448]{.colorPerS} [inches/second](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Inch_per_second)       | [0.05625]{.mono}                                                             | [0.09375]{.mono}                                                                |
| [0.9448]{.colorPerS} [feet/second](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Foot_per_second)         | [0.675]{.mono}                                                               | [0.675]{.mono}                                                                  |
| [0.9942]{.colorMile} [miles/hour](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Miles_per_hour)           | [0.96]{.mono}                                                                | [1.6]{.mono}                                                                    |
| [0.9448]{.colorPerS} yards/second                                                         | [2.025]{.mono}                                                               | [3.375]{.mono}                                                                  |
